name: HRQ_QSTN_RESPONSES_
description: This contains a participant's response to a specific question within a questionnaire.  This may reference the answer the user selected, or a rating level, or the actual entered text.  For multi-part questions (such as matching questions) it may also reference a sub-question.

columns.Name: QSTN_RESPONSE_ID
columns.Comments: Unique identifier for question response.  System generated primary key.

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning. Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: QSTNR_RESPONSE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifies the questionnaire response.

columns.Name: QSTNR_QUESTION_ID
columns.Comments: Identifies the questionnaire question.

columns.Name: SUB_QUESTION_ID
columns.Comments: Identifies the sub question.

columns.Name: QSTN_ANSWER_ID
columns.Comments: Identifies the answer for a question.

columns.Name: ANSWER_TEXT
columns.Comments: The answer for free text questions.

columns.Name: ANSWER_LIST
columns.Comments: Identifies the list of answers for a question that allows multiple selections to be made.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: SCORE
columns.Comments: Score for the Question response.

columns.Name: ANSWER_CLOB
columns.Comments: The answer for free text questions.

columns.Name: AUDIT_ACTION_TYPE_
columns.Comments: Action Type - have values like INSERT, UPDATE and DELETE.

columns.Name: AUDIT_CHANGE_BIT_MAP_
columns.Comments: Used to store a bit map of 1s and 0s for each column in the table.

columns.Name: AUDIT_IMPERSONATOR_
columns.Comments: Original Impersonator User.

columns.Name: CHOICE_LIST
columns.Comments: List of Choices presented out of the pool of choices for current response.

columns.Name: ANSWER_COMMENTS
columns.Comments: This field is used for capturing comments from the user.

columns.Name: RESPONSE_SENTIMENT
columns.Comments: This field is used for capturing sentiment analysis from the response.
